title: The Key to Loki’s Chains
description: On pages 14–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Gunko, Unknown person #14, Nami, Shamrock as Luffy, Zoro, and Nami push toward freeing Loki while Scopper Gaban tests them and God’s Knights begin a darker move against Elbaf’s children.
scene: Luffy, Zoro, and Nami push toward freeing Loki while Scopper Gaban tests them and God’s Knights begin a darker move against Elbaf’s children.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Let's change our tact... Contact Mary Geiose!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Not every piece ends up being useful...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wanted to go about this more shrewdly, but I guess not...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Captain of God's knights (world noble) FIGARLAND SHAMROCK son of elder England garling)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hmph... not yielding even if it means death!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Do we chalk this up to faith?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Long ago, the Savage Warriors of Elbaf...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The world government will bring them to heel no matter what!!

summary: This part advances the Scopper Gaban and Elbaf’s New Threat through 12 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
